NPC-GENERATOR-5E.App.Title: NPC Generator
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.Warnings.NoMatch: No NPC stat blocks match the requested challenge rating.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.Warnings.PackNotFound: Configured custom statblock compendium "{packId}" was not found; using bundled SRD stat blocks only.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.Settings.IncludeBundled: Include the 20 SRD 5.1 open-content NPC stat blocks (Commoner, Guard, Veteran, Mage, etc.) shipped with this module in the generation pool.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.Settings.CustomStatbloc: Optional. The pack ID (e.g. world.my-npcs) of an Actor compendium you own or built — such as one drawn from a published volume — to use as additional or alternative generation sources, bucketed automatically by each actor's Challenge Rating.
Optional. The UUID of a RollTable to draw NPC names from instead of the bundled generic name lists.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.Settings.AppendFlavor.H: Automatically roll and append an occupation, personality trait, ideal, bond, flaw, and quirk to each generated NPC's biography.
